message:
fix(extensions_js): check canonical_roots instead of removed roots variable and use array literals

Fix two sites in resolve_module_path that still referenced the removed
roots parameter: replace roots.is_empty() with canonical_roots.is_empty()
for the file:// URL guard and scope monotonicity enforcement checks.

Also replace vec![root.to_path_buf()] with [root.to_path_buf()] in 3 test
sites since the collections are immediately iterated and never need heap
allocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
